entries.reason: Split long agent projects into recursive planners and isolated workers
Deeper harness write-up with the planner/subplanner/worker architecture, throughput numbers, and the reasons they removed locks and integrators.
Put a contextual reviewer in front of risky agent actions
Make every agent task bootable in its own worktree with its own logs and traces
Defer tool loading so agents search for tools instead of hauling them into every prompt
Prompt-caching note independently supports the cost and latency gains from keeping the initial prompt stable while deferring tool definitions.
Audit coding benchmarks with investigator agents before you trust the score
Earlier contamination audit independently shows why coding-eval scorekeeping needs its own QA pipeline.
